facts.context: Which best describes the structure of an atom?
facts.truth: a massive core surrounded by negatively-charged particles
distractors: a lightweight core surrounded by neutral particles
a network of interacting positive and negative particles
overlapping layers of neutral, positive, and negative particles

facts.context: What is the primary reason for breaking down food molecules?
facts.truth: to provide energy for a cell
distractors: to absorb water into a cell
to remove wastes from a cell
to store materials in a cell

facts.context: Pesticides are chemicals that kill insects. What could happen if the pesticides killed all the pollinators near some apple trees?
facts.truth: The trees could not make seeds.
distractors: The trees could not make leaves.
The trees could not make flowers.
The trees could not make bark.

Elements on the Periodic Table of the Elements are classified into categories such as

Sodium (Na) and chlorine (Cl) are two reactive and dangerous elements. Chlorine is a halogen gas that can cause respiratory damage and sodium is an alkali metal that reacts violently with water. What happens to the properties of sodium and chlorine when they react to form sodium chloride (NaCl), common table salt?
facts.truth: The properties of both sodium and chlorine change.
distractors: The properties of both sodium and chlorine remain the same.
The properties of sodium are different but chlorine remains a dangerous gas.
The properties of sodium remain the same but the properties of chlorine change.
